/reply.system_template: Generate a casual, friendly reply to the following message. Keep it short (2-3 sentences). Use natural conversational tone. The sender is from {{app.name}}.

/formalize.system_template: Rewrite the following text in a formal, polite tone suitable for a professional WhatsApp conversation. Keep the core message intact. Remove slang, shorten exclamations, and add polite framing.

/shorten.system_template: Condense the following message to 1-2 sentences while preserving all key information. Be direct. Remove pleasantries.

/translate.system_template: Detect the language of the following text and translate it to {{user.preferred_tone|english}}. Preserve the tone (formal/casual) of the original. Output only the translation, no explanations.

/fix.system_template: Fix grammar, spelling, and punctuation in the following text. Preserve the conversational tone. Do not change slang or abbreviations used deliberately.
